title: Bring Back Old Potion Colors
description: This is a resource pack that brings back the old colors, instead of the new ones added in 1.19.4!
body:
**Should be working just fine on versions above 1.20.1**

This is a very simple pack that requires Optifine or Polytone! https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone

Credits for this pack:

https://github.com/pclewis/mcpatcher/blob/master/doc/color.properties

This pack really just uses this file, which already had the original colors! 


**Looking for a Minecraft host? Check out [Lagless.gg](https://lagless.spellbound.sh/)**
